findings.title: Global Script QueryAll in Tabs
findings.issue: document.querySelectorAll('[data-tabs]') uses global selector which could match unintended elements if multiple tab components exist on page
findings.suggestion: Consider scoping to a specific container or using a more specific selector if multiple tab instances are expected
findings.impact: If multiple independent tab components exist on the same page, clicking a trigger in one would affect all tabs

positiveFindings: All 15 React .tsx files successfully deleted from src/components/ui/
Pure Astro components properly structured with TypeScript interfaces
ThemeToggle correctly uses vanilla JS without React dependencies
Pagination includes proper guard for single-page scenarios (totalPages <= 1)
Accordion includes documentation for content sanitization requirement
All Card subcomponents (Header, Content, Footer, Title, Description) properly separated
